briefdescription.para: The thickness of the scroll bar.
The color of the scroll bar.
The minimum size of the scroll bar.
The offset of bars from the edges (padding is inherited from View)
The corner radius for each corner (topLeft, topRight, bottomRight, bottomLeft)
Last vertical bar bounds (for change detection)
Last horizontal bar bounds (for change detection)
True once bars are fully opaque (fade-in complete)
Fires 2 seconds after the last ShowBar call to trigger fade-out.
Called when fade in animation finishes.
Called when the auto-hide timer fires (2-second delay after last ShowBar).

memberdef.argsstring: (float x, float y, float width, float height)
memberdef.name: SetVBarBounds

briefdescription.para: Sets vertical bar bounds with change detection.

memberdef.argsstring: (float x, float y, float width, float height)
memberdef.name: SetHBarBounds

briefdescription.para: Sets horizontal bar bounds with change detection.
Applies corner radius to vertical and horizontal bars.
Gets the vertical scroll bar visibility.
Sets the vertical scroll bar visibility.
Gets the horizontal scroll bar visibility.
Sets the horizontal scroll bar visibility.

memberdef.argsstring: (float scrollWidth, float scrollHeight, float viewportWidth, float viewportHeight)
memberdef.name: UpdateBarSize

briefdescription.para: Updates the size of the scroll bar.
Sets the bar corner radius (same for all corners).
Sets the bar corner radius for each corner.
This is the internal implementation class for ScrollBar.

detaileddescription.para: ScrollBarImpl extends ViewImpl and provides scroll bar functionality for ScrollView and RecyclerView components.
